The woman in the white shirt and khaki pants walks briskly from the right towards the center, passing the sculptures. A person in a green patterned top remains stationary behind the leftmost sculpture. [8-12] A person in a blue hooded jacket and a man in a black t-shirt walk away from the camera on the right side. A person in a pink shirt and dark pants walks right-to-left behind the central totem. The woman in the white shirt and khaki pants walks briskly from the right towards the center, passing the sculptures. A person in a green patterned top remains stationary behind the leftmost sculpture. [8-12] A person in a blue hooded jacket and a man in a black t-shirt walk away from the camera on the right side. The woman in white exits the central view. The sculptures remain fixed amidst the shifting crowd. From 122s to 128s, a man in a dark suit gestures while speaking to a man in a black shirt who leans on a blue table with hands flat. Three colorful totem sculptures stand stationary on the table between them, while blurred attendees walk beneath red banners with yellow stars in the background. From 128s to 130s, the camera cuts to a close-up of the leftmost totem's upper section, showing a green face with a red arch, black rectangular eyes, small brown feathers, and geometric patterns in pink, black, and yellow. Between 130s and 134s, a close-up reveals a different totem section with a blocky face featuring vertical green rectangular eyes outlined in black and pink side panels with white details, set against blurred figures in tan and red. Finally, from 134s to 136s, the view shifts to a weathered totem top with red and teal feathers protruding from the center, flanked by painted black arched windows on a peeling white surface with red and yellow stripes.

[136-138] A static close-up captures a weathered wooden totem top featuring red and teal feathers, painted black arched windows, and peeling white surfaces with red and yellow stripes against a blurred green background. [138-148] The scene cuts to a medium shot of two men behind a blue table displaying three colorful wooden sculptures. The man on the left, in a dark suit and green tie, gestures with open hands, raises his left hand near the leftmost totem, and uses a thin stick to point at its base. The man on the right, wearing a black shirt and glasses, rests his hands on the table edge, observing. Blurred attendees walk beneath red banners with yellow stars in the background.

In a busy exhibition hall adorned with red banners featuring yellow stars, a man in a dark suit stands to the left of a blue table, holding a thin pointer and gesturing actively while speaking. Opposite him, a man in a black shirt leans on the table with both hands flat, observing the conversation and the display. Between them on the table stand three colorful, stationary totem sculptures of varying heights. The man in the suit alternates between pointing near the sculptures, clasping his hands near his waist, and gesturing with both hands to emphasize his points. Background attendees walk beneath the banners, blurred by motion, as the two men focus on the art pieces. The man in the black shirt maintains a steady posture, listening intently throughout the interaction.

[162-168] The man in the dark suit keeps his hands clasped holding a thin pointer near his waist while the man in the black shirt continues leaning on the blue table with hands flat. Three colorful totem sculptures remain stationary on the table surface amidst the moving crowd in the background. [168-170] The camera cuts from the two men talking to a close-up of the three colorful totem sculptures on the blue table. The central tall sculpture has geometric designs, flanked by shorter figures with rainbow and arch motifs. Blurred attendees, including people in green and pink shirts, stand in the background behind the stationary art pieces.
